assertions.assertion: Code defines a GoogleIdentityProvider class that extends IdentityProvider with a 'google' provider type constant
assertions.rationale: Lines 11-13 show `public class GoogleIdentityProvider : IdentityProvider` with `public const string ProviderType = "google"` and constructor calling `base(ProviderType)`.

assertions.assertion: GoogleIdentityProvider uses the indexer pattern (this["ClientId"]) for property storage
assertions.rationale: Lines 17-27 show `get => this["ClientId"]` and `set => this["ClientId"] = value` for both ClientId and ClientSecret properties.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddProviderType with GoogleHandler, GoogleOptions, and GoogleIdentityProvider type parameters
Code includes a ConfigureAuthenticationOptions-derived class that maps GoogleIdentityProvider properties to GoogleOptions
assertions.rationale: Lines 58-59 show `class GoogleDynamicConfigureOptions : ConfigureAuthenticationOptions<GoogleOptions, GoogleIdentityProvider>` with the Configure method mapping properties.

assertions.assertion: The configure class sets SignInScheme and CallbackPath on the GoogleOptions
